steps.title: Identify the challenged model
steps.content: The energy ladder explains household fuel choice mainly by income. The Kenya study is introduced to show that this model is reductive because fuel use also depends on other factors, including dwelling type.

steps.title: Choose the main purpose
steps.content: B incorrectly makes the model about fuel prices. C reverses the relationship by focusing on fuel use affecting income. D mentions two countries, but the main point is not simply comparison. The text challenges a common explanation for fuel choices. The answer is A.
